nodes.label: AI as writing assistant preserving personal voice
nodes.label_negative: AI rewriting that sounds robotic and perfect
nodes.grounding_span: AI sometimes sounds too robotic or perfect. I am not perfect and don't want to sound perfect to my coworkers

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for data analysis
nodes.grounding_span: I remember making an inventory list off a old very disorganized excel document, if I wouldn't of had ai it would have taken me hours to go through it

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: creativity tasks I generally like to do so I am less likely to use AI. Maybe I will use AI to get ideas but then will do the actual task myself

nodes.label: AI use for sensitive data
nodes.label_negative: AI use for tasks with PII
nodes.grounding_span: I sometimes handle tasks that have alot of PII that I don't feel comfortable using ai for

nodes.label: AI as threat to professional writing career
nodes.grounding_span: I feel as though my writing skills may suffer if I am always using ai to rewrite my work and make it better

nodes.label: Authentic personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I am not perfect and don't want to sound perfect to my coworkers

nodes.grounding_span: I don't feel comfortable using ai for

nodes.label: Skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I am not actively using my brain to find better words or ensure my grammar is the best it can be

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I feel as though my writing skills may suffer

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: creativity tasks I generally like to do so I am less likely to use AI

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will slowly use it more and more

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with AI to preserve personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I will normally read it and then ask ai to change things or add things. I often find myself saying rewrite using more of my original language

nodes.label: Domain-specific delegation based on task nature
nodes.grounding_span: emails are something that is more personal so I guess I involve myself more, wit other tasks I don't feel like that so I tend to let AI take over
